title: Ghost Enderman
body:
**_## Ender Leviathan – A Subnautica Sound Overhaul_**
 
Love Subnautica? Love Endermen? Then this resource pack is for you! It brings the terrifying roars of the "Dead Zone" to the mob that's perfect for it—the main connoisseur of water in all of Minecraft, the Enderman! This pack replaces the Enderman's vanilla sounds with the iconic and bone-chilling cries of the Ghost Leviathan, turning every encounter into a deep-sea horror experience.

🔊 Features:

· Leviathan's Roar: All Enderman sounds (idle, screaming, teleporting, dying) are replaced with the powerful and eerie vocalizations of the Ghost Leviathan from Subnautica.
· New Eerie Eyes: The Enderman's eyes have been subtly altered to better fit its new, terrifying aquatic persona.
· Atmospheric Dread: Completely transforms the ambiance of encountering an Enderman. The silence is now broken by the roars of a creature from the abyss.
· Lightweight & Compatible: Designed to work with most Minecraft versions and alongside other resource packs.

Whether you're in the End or the Overworld, the sound of an Enderman will now send a shiver down your spine, making you feel like you're not in Minecraft, but 1,000 meters below sea level. Perfect for fans of Subnautica and anyone who wants to add a dose of genuine thalassophobia to their world.
